Simple HTML to PDF Test

This is a simple HTML page designed to test basic HTML to PDF conversion. It includes basic formatting, CSS styling, and common HTML elements.

Features Tested

  • Basic text formatting (bold, italic, etc.)
  • Headings (H1, H2, H3)
  • Paragraphs with line spacing
  • CSS styling (colors, borders, backgrounds)
  • Lists (ordered and unordered)

Styled Content

This paragraph contains a highlighted section to test inline styling.

Boxed Content

This content is inside a styled box with a background color and border. It should render properly in the PDF output.

Text Formatting

This is bold text, this is italic text, and this is underlined text.

Conclusion

If you can see all the formatting above in the PDF, the basic HTML to PDF conversion is working correctly!
